actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (id: 1963046888) on Canvas_Labels references script guid 064216bc04beaca4fab9a6b5d9bca977, which matches the provided ToggleVisibility MonoBehaviour. ToggleVisibility exposes a public, parameterless method Toggle() that toggles Renderer.enabled on the same GameObject. Note: Canvas_Labels is a UI Canvas (RectTransform) and likely has no Renderer; Awake() assigns currentRenderer = GetComponent<Renderer>() which would be null, so calling Toggle() will likely cause a NullReferenceException when accessing currentRenderer.enabled. There are no serialized UnityEvent m_Calls defined for this component in the scene file.
